\[
\left\| s ^ {\prime} - s _ {E} ^ {\prime} \right\| \leq L C \left\| h _ {\Omega_ {E}} (s) - h _ {\psi} (s) \right\| + L \left\| I _ {\pi_ {\mathcal {B}}} (s, \hat {s} ^ {\prime}) - I _ {\phi} (s, \hat {s} ^ {\prime}) \right\|,
\]

Input: State-only expert demonstration data \(\mathcal{D} = \{(s_i)\}_{i=1}^N\), empty replay buffer \(\mathcal{B}\), randomly initialized discriminator model \(D_{\omega}\), state transition predictor \(h_{\psi}\) and parameterized inverse dynamics model \(I_{\phi}\)  
for \(k = 0,1,2,\dots\) do  
\(\triangleright\) Pre-training stage  
Collect trajectories \(\{(s,a,s',\text{done})\}\) using a random initialized policy \(\pi = \mathbb{E}_{\epsilon \sim \mathcal{N}}[I_{\phi}(a|s,h_{\psi}(\epsilon ;s))]\) and store in \(\mathcal{B}\)  
Sample \((s,a,s') \sim \mathcal{B}\) and update \(\phi\) by \(L^{I}\) (Eq. (9))  
end for  
for \(k = 0,1,2,\dots\) do  
\(\triangleright\) Online training stage  
Collect trajectories \(\{(s,a,s',r,\text{done})\}\) using current policy \(\pi = \mathbb{E}_{\epsilon \sim \mathcal{N}}[I_{\phi}(a|s,h_{\psi}(\epsilon ;s))]\), where \(r\) can be obtained from the environment (RL) or the discriminator \(D_{\omega}\) (IL), and store in \(\mathcal{B}\)  
Sample \((s,a,s') \sim \mathcal{B}\), \((s,s') \sim \mathcal{D}\)  
if learn inverse dynamics function then  
repeat  
Update \(\phi\) by \(L^{I}\) (Eq. (9))  
until Converged  
end if  
if doing imitation learning then  
Update the discriminator \(D_{\omega}\) with the loss:  
\(\mathcal{L}_{\omega}^{D} = -\mathbb{E}_{(s,s')\sim \mathcal{B}}[\log D_{\omega}(s,s')] - \mathbb{E}_{(s,s')\sim \mathcal{D}}[\log (1 - D_{\omega}(s,s'))]\),  
end if  
Sample \((s,a,r,s') \sim \mathcal{B}\)  
Update \(\psi\) by \(\mathcal{L}_{\psi}^{\pi ,h}\) (Eq. (17))  
end for
